role_in_synthesis: DF-08 defines the survivorship-free universe question (delisted/failed assets with last tradable price, delisting date, failure cause) and its known-delisting reconstruction test.
Records per-source acceptance decisions used to scope which venues carry any listing/delivery observations.

Contains bounded earliest/latest timestamps within sampled/archive objects, not proven asset-lifetime first/last trades. BTCUSDU26 carries a scheduled future deliveryTime (1790323200000), not an observed completed delivery. Sample/archive edges must never be equated with lifecycle listing/delisting events.
Plan for PIT reference/event handling; announcement known-time vs effective-time and state-transition history are identified as required but unproven.

Sprint-003 RD-06 recorded partial listing/delivery feasibility; its next action proposed an instrument-master (launchTime/deliveryTime/state) plus last-trade polling. RD-06 did not itself grant source or implementation authority. Later accepted REF-002/REF-003 decisions block the Bybit-dependent path.
REF-001 provides accepted bitemporal identity/event-storage substrate only; not a survivorship-free event authority.
Bybit instrument event source feasibility; accepted with NO AUTHORITY for historical universe events.
Documents Bybit historical event feasibility gaps; does not establish complete listing/delisting authority.
Accepts REF-002 as NO AUTHORITY; blocks Bybit historical instrument event authority.
Gate results underpinning REF-002 NO AUTHORITY; retained as prior accepted evidence.
Bybit prospective instrument snapshot authority; accepted with NO_AUTHORITY.
Documents prospective snapshot gaps; does not establish prospective event authority.
Accepts REF-003 as NO_AUTHORITY; blocks Bybit prospective snapshot authority.
Gate results underpinning REF-003 NO_AUTHORITY; retained as prior accepted evidence.
Preserved market-bar boundary only: DF-08 does not downgrade accepted canonical-bar authority.
Preserved market-bar boundary only: accepted canonical-bar authority is preserved, not downgraded by DF-08.
